title: Connection lost during PDF extraction
symptom: The n8n service loses connection and restarts when attempting to extract text from a PDF file using the Extract from PDF node.
not_this_if: Error does not occur with smaller PDF files
Running in a different execution mode
root_cause: The error occurs due to an out-of-memory condition when processing larger PDF files, causing the n8n service to crash and restart without logging the error, making it difficult to diagnose.
fix_steps: Check the size of the PDF files being processed and reduce them if necessary.
Increase the memory allocation for the n8n Docker container.
Monitor the logs for any additional errors after making these changes.
agent_instruction: Reduce the size of the PDF files or increase the memory allocation for the n8n Docker container.
